title: Industrious Thoughts
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Industrious Thoughts''''' was the lead [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in the [[Diamal]]-led pro-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] fleet at the [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|Second Battle of Bothawui]].

During the first phase of the battle, it was the command starship for [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Porolo Miatamia]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] was also on board, as a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representative trying to defuse the crisis. When the [[Ishori]] flagship ''[[Predominance]]'' fired on the Bothan [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Drev'starn]], Miatamia's fleet entered the battle. At the time, they were unaware that [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] saboteurs had taken control of weapons emplacements on the ''Predominance'' and attacked the city.

During the battle, Calrissian managed to contact [[Ponc Gavrisom]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], who had been on the ''Predominance'' trying to convince the anti-Bothan alliance to stand down. When Organa Solo took the ''Predominance'' on a new course to investigate a suspicious comet, Calrissian convinced Miatamia to follow them. Once they discovered that there were cloaked [[Imperial Remnant]] vessels in the system, Calrissian was hastily recommissioned as a [[General/Legends|general]]. With the ''Industrious Thoughts'' as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], General Calrissian took command of the combined pro-Bothan and anti-Bothan fleets, and forced the Imperials to retreat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
